name: base_default
why: Stage-1 bar: what does the strongest open-weights model know bare, with the provided prompt?

config._comment: Single source of truth for model choices. baseline_model = the strongest open-weights model, used ONLY for the Stage-1 bare baseline we must beat. test_model = the generator our actual system runs on (smaller/cheaper on purpose: a model that reads the right page should beat a bigger one that remembers the internet). judge_model = pinned forever for score comparability across runs — do NOT bump it mid-exercise.
